author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint A.2 covers three issues (#850, #851, #852). This parent issue tracks the mmap load variant conformance tests (#850). Approach: add conformance_serialize_mmap.rs with tests for load_safetensors_mmap (single-file round-trip, values match standard load, missing-file error). Also remove the #850 cascade_skip entry from conformance_serialize.rs and the #850 exclusion entries from _surface_exclusions.toml once tests land. No source changes expected.
